text.title: Design Tokens Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for design-tokens.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the design system span multiple products or platforms and need stable tokens?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — token pipeline overhead exceeds payoff
BLOCK — wire parity check before merge
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: Multi-platform + dark mode → first two branches do not match → no hex in components → no hand-edits → parity check wired → all_gates_green=true → run-the-checklist → APPROVE.
